title: Test: Add chaos engineering tests
original_text: Added chaos engineering tests using Chaos Monkey. Implemented fault injection tests for network failures. Added fault injection tests for service crashes. Implemented chaos tests for database failures. Added chaos test scenarios and recovery verification. Result: system resilient to chaos.
expected_body_lines: - Implement fault injection tests for network failures
- Add fault injection tests for service crashes
- Implement chaos tests for database failures
- Add chaos test scenarios and recovery verification
expected_command: git commit -m "test(resilience): add chaos engineering tests"
